content.en:
These six Ultimate Ancient Demons are the most powerful of the Ultimate Ancient Demons that are still alive today, and they have also snatched some space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Treasure Fragments before, and used these fragments to improve the Extreme Path Ultimate Rules, and also created a powerful Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane.

Now, they were full of confidence and wanted to besiege Ye Tian, the ultimate ancient demon, and snatch a large number of space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments on Ye Tian's body.

In fact, the purpose of the six of them was not only the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment on Ye Tian's body, but also the space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Treasure Fragment on the other Ultimate Gu Demons' body, they also wanted to snatch it.

It's just that Ye Tian has the most space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments, and they don't want Ye Tian to have enough time to grow up, so they will come to besiege and kill Ye Tian as soon as possible.

......

"Six Ultimate Ancient Demons, it seems that the one who came is not good!"

Ye Tianmu's "Five-Nine-Zero" light looked through the space-time bubble and looked at the six Ultimate Ancient Demons standing on the endless space-time line.

Swish!

As soon as his body moved, he came to the endless time and space line.

"Six Ultimate Ancient Demons, what are you doing here?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Heavenly Ancient Demon, hand over all the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments on your body, otherwise you will die today. "

The six Ultimate Ancient Demons said coldly.

"If you hand over the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment, I may spare you. "

Li Changsheng smiled coldly and said.

"Look for death!"

The six Ultimate Ancient Demons were extremely furious, and directly cast the Extreme Ultimate Arcane to kill Ye Tian, each of them with an attack power far exceeding that of other ordinary Ultimate Ancient Demons.

In the face of these six ultimate ancient demons, Ye Tian didn't dare to be careless, and directly broke out his strongest move-space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane-Extreme Path Blade!

Tear and pull!

The endless space-time line was cut off, and the three ultimate ancient demons didn't have time to dodge, they were directly hit, and their bodies were directly shattered by the Extreme Time and Space Sword Blade, but their bodies quickly recovered.

However, they had already been severely damaged, and their condensed bodies were far inferior to before.

One move struck three top-notch Ultimate Ancient Demons, which made them tremble.

"Space-time Grade Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane!"

"Oh no, this guy is another Dovi Ancient Demon!"

"Run!"

They knew very well that it was impossible for them to kill Ye Tian, and they would even be killed by Ye Tian.

In order to besiege and kill the Duowei Ancient Demons, how many Ultimate Ancient Demons died, most of the Ultimate Ancient Demons in the Endless Time and Space Domain have fallen, and many have not recovered from their injuries yet.

Now, just because they want to kill a terrifying existence close to the Dovigu Demon, how can this be fought?

Knowing that Ye Tian was so terrifying, they would never dare to come to fight Ye Tian's idea!

But they wanted to go, but Ye Tian wouldn't let them go.

"Dark Prison!"

"Time is solid!"

"Extreme Dao Ultimate Sword Realm!"

These three Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane Techniques were unleashed, and the six Ultimate Ancient Demons were suddenly unable to escape, and their speed was extremely slow.

"Fight!"

These six Ultimate Ancient Demon Burning Origins fought against Ye Tian.

However.

Ye Tian once again cast an Extreme Time and Space Sword Blade, directly killing an Ultimate Ancient Demon.

Thundered!!!

The battle was fought in this endless space-time line, shattering one space-time line after another.

Soon, another Ultimate Ancient Demon was slain.

And they didn't cause any injuries to Ye Tian, Ye Tian was still in good condition except for consuming some strength.

Soon, the other Ultimate Ancient Demons were killed by Ye Tian one by one, and Ye Tian was also injured, after all, the final death-defying attack of these Ultimate Ancient Demons still caused him some trouble.

After killing these six Ultimate Ancient Demons, Ye Tian obtained some space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragments on their bodies, which could be regarded as an unexpected gain.

Soon.

The other Ultimate Ancient Demons learned of the fall of these six Ultimate Ancient Demons, and they probably guessed who they fell, and they became extremely jealous of Ye Tian one by one.

But after the Dovi Ancient Demon incident, they really didn't dare to besiege Ye Tian again, otherwise the remaining Ultimate Ancient Demons would all fall away.

It's not something they want to do.

......

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the space-time level Extreme Dao Ultimate Treasure Fragment, and his strength was also steadily improving.

After a long period of time, Ye Tian once again created a space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane - Extreme Path Space-Time Ball, which uses the Extreme Path Space-Time Sphere to resist all attacks, and is a space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane that truly defends against everything.........

And his research on the copy talent ball has also reached 90% progress, and it is not far from really studying the copy talent ball thoroughly.

And as Ye Tian's strength became stronger and stronger, he obviously sensed that this era seemed to be rejecting him.

After all, this space-time is not a real space-time, he is just a consciousness shuttling through space-time, all of this is illusory, and if he is too powerful, this void space-time will not be able to carry him.

"It seems that I can't stay until the end of this plane. Ye Tian muttered.

Thereupon.

He spent all his time analyzing the copy talent ball, there was no need to continue to improve his strength, after all, this improved strength could not be brought back, only the copy talent ball and the various ultimate arcanes, extreme path ultimate arts, and space-time level extreme path ultimate arcane could be brought back.

91%！

92%！

Ye Tian was getting closer and closer to the Analytical Replication Talent Ball, and he was getting more and more excited.

And during this time, he also created the third space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane - Extreme Path Space-Time Escape Light, which made his strength a lot stronger again.

In fact, he was now violently repulsed by the plane, but he was still in the process of putting the finishing touches on it.

Finally.

100% resolution of the copy orb!

At this moment, this copy talent ball no longer has any secrets, and he can condense 2.4 copies of his own talent ball with his hands.

In other words, he returned to his own time and space, and he could also let his copy talent transform into the limit state of the copy talent ball.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't say anything goodbye to the people of the Eagle Division, and once he left this plane, it was a phantom to him, and nothing existed.

The mind moved.

Ye Tian disappeared from this time and space.

......

Sea of Dimensions.

Terran territory.

Ye Tian was asleep. []

Suddenly, the space-time particle aura on Ye Tian's body exploded, and then his consciousness returned.

"It's back!"

Ye Tian sensed everything familiar around him, and muttered in his mouth.
